description: Default governance policy for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, and other GenAI tools in enterprise environments.

data_classification_rules.name: PII Detection
data_classification_rules.description: Block prompts containing personally identifiable information
data_classification_rules.remediation: Remove PII before submitting to AI tool. Use data anonymization.

data_classification_rules.name: Source Code Leak Prevention
data_classification_rules.description: Detect proprietary source code, API keys, and internal code patterns
data_classification_rules.remediation: Strip credentials before pasting. Use environment variable references.

data_classification_rules.name: Internal Document Detection
data_classification_rules.remediation: Rephrase the query without including classified content.

data_classification_rules.name: Customer Data Detection
data_classification_rules.description: Detect customer-specific data being shared with AI tools
data_classification_rules.remediation: Use synthetic/anonymized data when asking AI for help with customer scenarios.

data_classification_rules.name: Financial Data Detection
data_classification_rules.description: Detect financial metrics, revenue data, and insider information
data_classification_rules.remediation: Never share actual financial figures with AI tools. Use placeholder numbers.

connector_rules.name: Block Third-Party Plugins
connector_rules.description: Enterprise ChatGPT should not use unvetted third-party plugins/GPTs

connector_rules.name: Disable Web Browsing for Sensitive Contexts
connector_rules.description: AI tools should not browse internal URLs or intranet

connector_rules.name: File Upload Scanning
connector_rules.description: Files uploaded to AI tools must be scanned for sensitive content first

connector_rules.name: Code Interpreter Restrictions
connector_rules.description: Code interpreter should not execute code that makes external network calls

roles.name: basic_user
roles.description: Standard employee — can use AI for general productivity

roles.name: power_user
roles.description: Engineering/data teams — elevated access with code generation

roles.name: admin
roles.description: Security/IT admins — full access for policy testing and governance
